gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot holding a freshly printed newspaper or painting a sign, with Polly the bee reading it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a freshly printed pixelated newspaper, while the cute bee mascot reads it. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
